items.text:
I feel watched.
Perhaps the M'wrights
have turned their glass upon me.
I'll give them worth the seeing.

You aim too low.
We leave now,

send a flotilla back,
and take all the mirrors.

Hassle, hassle. If it's peace we want,
let's quit it all.

The wife never really wanted me,
the child is sufficiently raised.

Just disappear, be myself.
A new life.
